steps.text: Two colossal statues face each other across a roaring waterfall. On the far cliff stands Sasuke — and a guard of borrowed shinobi.

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: So you actually came. You always were stubborn.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: I made a promise. I'm dragging you home, Sasuke — that's my ninja way!

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: Then come. Get through my squad first — if your bonds are really worth anything.

boss.victory_text: Sasuke's borrowed shinobi scatter into smoke. He rises, the cursed mark crawling across his skin. 'Fine. No more games.'
